params.name: West Lake Fish Vinegar
params.description: A renowned dish from Cathay, known for its stark contrast in flavor and appearance, has left countless tourists questioning their life choices. Amidst the layers of doubt, no one knows where to find the most authentic West Lake Vinegar Fish.
